title: 2025 FOMC Press Releases
summary: This is a navigation index page on federalreserve.gov listing links to FOMC statements and economic projections releases from 2025 (January through December). The page does not contain the actual content of any FOMC statement; it only provides dates and titles of 13 separate releases that must be accessed individually. The page requires JavaScript for full functionality and was last updated February 26, 2026.
key_points: This is a listing/navigation page, not an archiveable source containing FOMC statement content
The page lists 13 FOMC-related releases from 2025: 7 FOMC statements and 4 economic projections (dot plot/SEP) documents
Economic projections were released alongside FOMC statements on 3/19, 6/18, 9/17, and 12/10/2025
The page requires JavaScript to function properly as a navigation hub
Last update date stated on page: February 26, 2026
why_it_matters: This source serves only as a directory to individual FOMC releases. It cannot be used directly for research on monetary policy decisions because it contains no actual statement text, rate decisions, vote tallies, or forward guidance language. Individual FOMC statements and projections must be retrieved separately.
notes: NON-ARCHIVABLE: This is a listing page containing only links and dates to 2025 FOMC releases. Per CORE RULE 6, listing pages are treated as non-archiveable. The individual FOMC statements and projections should be crawled as separate sources. No policy content, rate decisions, or substantive macro information can be extracted from this page.

reasoning: requires individual statement pages for policy content
